steps.t: Blooms of Decay can be found at Kêr Bras, inside the Paths of the Dead, far to the north of Dol Amroth. Avordur asked you to gather several Blooms of …
Avordur is in Dol Amroth, far to the south of the Paths of the Dead. Avordur will be pleased to begin working on the Blooms of Decay you recovered.
